title: ASR Outdoor 4 in 1 350 Lumen Multi Color Tilting Head Lamp Camping Garden Hiking
description:
The ASR Outdoor 4 in 1 5 Watt or 350 Lumen Head Lamp is a must-have for any occasion whether you are working in dark, cramped spaces or wish to read a book in the darkness of night while camping, this headlamp will suit all your needs. The lamp can be adjusted to the best position for optimum lighting. The light also has a dual switch that can either change the color or the lighting. The three colors are White, Red, and Green. The three lighting settings are High, Low, and Strobe. There is a multitude of activities that can be used with this light. You could take it camping, lighten a crawl space, or lighten up your path during a walk at night. Requires 3 AAA batteries (not included).

ASR Outdoor 4 in 1 350 Lumen Multi Color Tilting Head Lamp Camping Garden Hiking

The ASR Outdoor 4 in 1 5 Watt or 350 Lumen Head Lamp is a must-have for any occasion whether you are working in dark, cramped spaces or wish to read a book in the darkness of night while camping, this headlamp will suit all your needs. The lamp can be adjusted to the best position for optimum lighting.

Key Features

  • FEATURES - 4 in 1 Multi Color Adjustable Head Lamp
  • BRIGHTNESS - 5 Watt or 350 Lumen | Requires 3 AAA Batteries (Not Included)
  • ADJUSTABLE - Tilting Head to give optimum advantage
  • BEAM RANGE - 300 FT
  • DUAL SWITCH - LED Color (Red, Green, White) and 3 Stages (High, Low, Strobe)

Product Specifications

  • MPN: MCHL
  • UPC: 060886221388
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 2.5 in

The light also has a dual switch that can either change the color or the lighting. The three colors are White, Red, and Green. The three lighting settings are High, Low, and Strobe. There is a multitude of activities that can be used with this light. You could take it camping, lighten a crawl space, or lighten up your path during a walk at night.

Requires 3 AAA batteries (not included).
